title: My Applications
subtitle: Review your recent run applications and manage anything still pending.
empty_description: Once you apply to runs, they will show up here from newest to oldest.
summary_fallback: Your submitted run details and current application status are summarized here.
locked_help: Applications can only be edited or withdrawn while they are still pending review.

sections.active_description: Your current signups that are still live, pending, or otherwise in motion.
sections.active_empty_description: Anything still in progress will show up here.
sections.history_description: Past, declined, withdrawn, or otherwise closed-out applications stay here for reference.
sections.history_empty_description: Once an application is completed, declined, withdrawn, or archived, it will move here.

withdraw.title: Cancel Application
withdraw.description: Withdraw this pending application from the run queue.
withdraw.warning_description: The application will move to your history. If you want to sign up again later, you will need to submit a new one.
withdraw.success_description: Your application has been withdrawn and moved to your history.
withdraw.error_description: This application could not be cancelled right now.
